DISCOVERY 302, RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, PETITIONERS DEIRDRE RAND & RANDY RAND'S PETITION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS DUCES TECUM AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED, IN PART. DIERDRE RAND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS BY MARCH 15, 2013. DR. RANDY RAND AND DR, DIERDRE RAND TO BE DEPOSED NO LATER THAN MARCH 29, 2013. ALL MATERIALS PRODUCED MAY ONLY BE USED FOR PURPOSES OF LITIGATION IN VIRGINIA. IF FILED IN THE VIRGINIA LITIGATION, RESPONDENT SHARON JEU WILL MAKE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IN THAT COURT. SHARON JUE, BY STIPULATION THROUGH HER COUNSEL, SUBMITS TO "PERMANENT JURISDICTION" BY THIS COURT TO ENFORCE PROVISIONS OF THIS CONFIDENTIALITY ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE RESPONDED TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Motion To Modify Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBYN D. ROBERTS of Bjork Lawrence, Tel No. (925) 279-1150 appearing for Petitioners Deirdre Rand and Randy Rand;
Attys. KEVIN RUBINO (Tel No. 415-984-8700) and DAVID R. DOREY (Tel No. 202-383-5300) of O'Melveny & Myers appearing for Respondent Sharon Jeu (Mr. Dorey appearing telephonically).

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT SHARON JEU'S Motion To Modify Protective Order And Request For Sanctions is granted. Request for sanctions granted in the amount of $10,000 to be paid by petitioners Rand and their attorney within 30 days from entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Joan Marie Columbini, CSR #5435, Tel No. (415) 597-5600 (302/EHG)

RESPONDENT SHARON JEU'S Motion To Modify Protective Order And Request For Sanctionsr is transferred to the Discovery Calendar to be heard on the same date at 9:00 am in room 301. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Motion To Modify Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robyn Roberts of Bjork Lawrence Attorneys at Law telephone number (925) 279-1150 for Petitioners.
Kevin Rubino of O'Melveny & Myers LLP telephone number (415) 984-8700 for Respondents.

Counsel for petititoner did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The Motion to Modify Protective Order and Request for Sanctions is continued to March 24, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Application To Seal Records Lodged Provisionally Under Seal
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID R. DOREY of O'Melveny & Myers, Tel No. (202) 383-5300 appearing telephonically for Respondent Sharon Jeu;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT SHARON JEU'S Application To Seal Records Lodged Provisionally Under Seal is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Paula J. Shi, CSR #13358 (302/EHG)

Petition To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum And Req For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN FLEER, ESQ., 925.930.9518, FOR PETITIONERSL RANDY RAND PHD & DEIRDRE RAND PHD.
DIXIE NOONAN, ESQ., 415.984.8700, FOR RESPONDENT SHARON JEU.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. at conclusion of argument, PETITIONERs DEIRDRE RAND & RANDY RAND's Petition To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum And Request For Sanctions is denied, in part. dierdre rand to produce documents by march 15, 2013. dr. randy rand and dr, dierdre rand to be deposed no later than march 29, 2013. all materials produced may only be used for purposes of litigation in virginia. if filed in the virginia litigation, respondent sharon jeu will make motion for protective order in that court. Sharon jue, by stipulation through her counsel, submits to "permanent jurisdiction" by this court to enforce provisions of this confidentiality order. counsel for the responded to prepare proposed order. JUDGE PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
